note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left plantar wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left plantar measures 1.9 cm x 3.8 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 37% slough, 63% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: none.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left plantar — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Offloading boot applied.
